/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/heightmap.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/heightmap.dir/heightmap.c.o CMakeFiles/heightmap.dir/__/deps/glad.c.o -o heightmap  ../src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXrandr.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXinerama.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXi.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXcursor.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so -ldl
